instruction: Design a birthday party plan for a 5-year-old, specifying games, snacks, and decorations. The plan must include at least three games, with one being a team-based activity. The letter "S" must appear exactly 15 times throughout the response. The entire response must be written in English and include a relevant English idiom. Maintain a cheerful and positive tone throughout the response. The phrase "fun for everyone" must appear exactly twice. The response must contain exactly 10 sentences, with each paragraph containing at least 3 sentences. Avoid using any idioms in the response.
response:
Start with a sunny setup that brings smiles to every small face.
Set up a space where the sun shines bright for all guests.
Such a spot makes the day special for everyone.

Play a game of Simon Says to get the kids moving fast.
Then try a team-based activity called Scavenger Hunt for fun.
This hunt is great for everyone who loves to search.

Serve sweet snacks like strawberries and slices of sweet cake.
Share some soft sandwiches that taste so good to eat.
Such tasty treats make the party feel so right.

See how much joy this plan brings to each smiling child.
Such a day is sure to be a success for all.
Stay safe and have fun for everyone today.

Conflicts between Format Constraints.new_constraint: Avoid using any idioms in the response.
Conflicts between Format Constraints.org_constraint: The entire response must be written in English and include a relevant English idiom.
